title: Label
description: Identity, defaults, and configuration for a virtual label instance.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Increment on breaking changes.

id.description: Slug identifier for this label. Lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens. Matches workspace/label/ directory name convention.

description.description: Short description of the label's mission or focus.

default_license.description: Default license applied to releases unless overridden. e.g. 'CC BY 4.0', 'All Rights Reserved'.

styleguide_path.description: Relative path to the label's style guide within the workspace. e.g. 'label/styleguide/'.

sites.description: Website targets for 'ovl site sync'. Each entry points to an Astro site whose content collections mirror the OVL workspace. The workspace is the canonical source; sites are secondary consumers.

id.description: Slug identifier for this site. Used with 'ovl site sync --site <id>'.

path.description: Path to the site root. Relative paths are resolved from the workspace directory. e.g. 'sites/my-label.com'.

artist_id.description: Restrict sync to a single artist's records. When set, only that artist's artist.json and releases are copied. Omit for a label-wide site that includes all artists.

artists_dir.description: Destination directory for synced artist JSON files, relative to the site root. Defaults to 'src/content/artists'. Override when the site already uses that path for another collection.

releases_dir.description: Destination directory for synced release JSON files, relative to the site root. Defaults to 'src/content/releases'. Override when the site already uses that path for another collection.

description.description: Human-readable label for this site. e.g. 'Label site', 'Brylie Christopher artist site'.

created_date.description: ISO 8601 date when this label workspace was initialized.
